User.title: User
User.description: User profile inside the sports portal

id.description: Unique identifier of the user (matching their Auth UID)

role.description: User role in the tournament system

isVerified.description: Whether the user's email has been verified

passwordHash.description: Hashed password of the user (for client-side/custom simulation authentication)

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the user profile was created

AppState.title: AppState
AppState.description: The entire database state representing tournaments, matches, teams, fixtures, and news

matches.description: List of matches and matches' logs

/users/{userId}.description: Stores individual user profile credentials and roles

/app_state/{stateId}.description: Stores the synchronized sports tournament database state
